local_memo.text: The medical director completed the peer-to-peer discussion for P2P-TE-004. Please close the PET MPI authorization file with the final outcome, policy criteria status, any criteria changed by information supplied during the call, authorization details if applicable, and appeal-path handling if the final determination remains adverse.
